title_zh: 南柱赫、卢允瑞、曹承佑《东宫》角色海报公开，气场全开
facts_list: Netflix新剧《东宫》公开角色海报，主演南柱赫、卢允瑞、曹承佑
南柱赫饰演能穿梭鬼魂世界的具天，卢允瑞饰演能听见鬼魂声音的宫女生刚
summary_zh: Netflix新剧《东宫》公开角色海报，主演南柱赫、卢允瑞、曹承佑气场全开。该剧讲述能穿梭鬼魂世界的具天（南柱赫饰）与能听见鬼魂声音的宫女生刚（卢允瑞饰）的故事。

title: Watch: Hwang In Youp And Hyeri Reunite To Direct A Film They Once Wrote Together In “Dream To You” Teaser
content:

title_zh: K-pop艺人穿邦联旗衬衫引争议，所属社道歉

所属社发布道歉声明，为艺人的不当着装致歉
summary_zh: 一名K-pop艺人因穿着印有邦联旗的‘复古’衬衫而遭到公众批评。邦联旗在美国被视为种族主义和白人至上的象征。该艺人的所属社随后发布道歉声明，为艺人的不当着装选择致歉。

title: June Actor Brand Reputation Rankings Announced
content:
The Korean Business Research Institute has revealed this month’s brand reputation rankings for actors! The rankings were determined through a data analysis of the media coverage, participation, interaction, and community indexes of 100 actors who appeared in dramas, movies, or OTT content released between May 23 and June 23. Heo Nam Jun, who recently stole… Continue reading June Actor Brand Reputation Rankings Announced
The post June Actor Brand Reputation Rankings Announced appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 6月演员品牌声誉排行榜公布，许南俊登顶
facts_list: 韩国企业评价研究所于6月23日发布6月演员品牌声誉排行榜
排名基于5月23日至6月23日期间出演电视剧、电影或OTT内容的100位演员的媒体覆盖、参与、互动和社区指数数据分析
许南俊（Heo Nam Jun）近期表现突出，位居榜首
summary_zh: 韩国企业评价研究所公布了6月演员品牌声誉排行榜，该排名基于5月23日至6月23日期间对100位出演电视剧、电影或OTT内容的演员进行的媒体覆盖、参与、互动和社区指数数据分析。许南俊凭借近期表现登顶榜首。

title: BOYNEXTDOOR, I.O.I, CORTIS, And BTS Top Circle Weekly Charts
content:
Circle Chart has revealed its chart rankings for the week of June 7 to 13! Album Chart BOYNEXTDOOR achieved a double crown on this week’s charts, topping both the physical album chart and the digital download chart with their new album “HOME” and its title track “VIRAL.” “HOME,” BOYNEXTDOOR’s first studio album, swept the top… Continue reading BOYNEXTDOOR, I.O.I, CORTIS, And BTS Top Circle Weekly Charts
The post BOYNEXTDOOR, I.O.I, CORTIS, And BTS Top Circle Weekly Charts appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BOYNEXTDOOR、I.O.I、CORTIS、BTS 登顶 Circle 周榜
facts_list: Circle Chart 公布6月7日至13日周榜排名
BOYNEXTDOOR 凭借首张正规专辑《HOME》及主打曲《VIRAL》获得实体专辑榜和数字下载榜双冠王
summary_zh: Circle Chart 公布6月7日至13日周榜排名，BOYNEXTDOOR 凭借首张正规专辑《HOME》及主打曲《VIRAL》获得实体专辑榜和数字下载榜双冠王。I.O.I、CORTIS 和 BTS 也分别在不同榜单登顶。
